exit: Leaving already? Bold strategy.

Farewell. The silence will be suspiciously refreshing.
Don't worry, I'll pretend this was emotional.

Off you go, then. Very dramatic.

Leaving so soon? I had almost started caring.
Goodbye. This place will somehow recover.

Farewell. I'll alert the imaginary crowd.
